title: DIEGETIC GUI - immersive crafting menus
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lnJ1v1uP4r0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Diegetic GUI takes the boring, flat menu screens and transforms them into something more realistic and immersive, making them feel more part of the game world and what it would look like if you're interacting with the block.


DOWNLOAD CONTAINS LIGHT AND DARK MODE
 

# GUI done: ✅

- Anvil
- Barrel
- Beacon
- Brewing Stand
- Cartography Table
- Chest
- Crafting Table
- Ender Chest
- Hopper
- Grindstone
- Loom
- Smithing Table
- Stone Cutter

 

# GUI left to do: 🚧

- Dropper
- Dispenser
- Furnace Family
- Horses
- Player
- Shulkers
- Villager
